name: @umbraculum/brewery-recipes-ui
description: Brewery-vertical domain UI — recipe / mash / water / yeast editors. Sits one tier above @umbraculum/ui (platform-neutral primitives). Cross-platform (web + native) via injected-adapter pattern. Brewery-vertical-classified per sub-plan #9 §1.1 (recipe domain is brewing-specific; the @umbraculum/brewery-* prefix marks the vertical boundary).
